---
title: "Research"
editor: visual
---

1\) [Demographic histories and genetic diversity across pinnipeds are shaped by human exploitation, ecology and life-history](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41467-018-06695-z). Nat Comms (2018) \| [Code](https://github.com/mastoffel/pinniped_bottlenecks)

:::{.columns}

:::{.callout-tip collapse="true" .callout-note icon=false appearance="simple" .column width="50%"}
# summary

This is a summary
:::

:::{.callout-warning collapse="true" .callout-note icon=false appearance="simple" .column width="50%"}
# doubts

These are some *doubts*
:::

:::
